name: Amihan Tempest 4T
shortDesc: Premium motorcycle engine oil for heavy-duty use. Maximum protection for high-performance bikes.
description: The Bagani Amihan Tempest 4T is a premium 4-stroke motorcycle engine oil formulated to deliver maximum engine protection and performance for high-performance motorcycles. Engineered for Filipino riders who demand the best from their machines, whether on daily commutes or weekend rides.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino! — the Amihan Tempest meets JASO MA-2 standards, ensuring excellent wet clutch compatibility and superior thermal stability even in tropical heat.

features.title: Maximum Engine Protection
features.desc: Advanced additive package provides superior wear protection, extending engine life even under heavy load and high RPM conditions.

features.title: JASO MA-2 Certified
features.desc: Meets JASO MA-2 standard for full compatibility with wet clutch systems found in most modern motorcycles.

features.title: Thermal Stability
features.desc: Specially formulated to maintain viscosity and performance in the heat of Philippine roads and tropical climate conditions.

features.title: Filipino-Made Quality
features.desc: Proudly manufactured in the Philippines, Bagani oils are crafted to meet the unique demands of Filipino riding conditions.

applications: Vehicles operated in hot tropical climates

faqs.q: How often should I change my motorcycle oil?
faqs.a: For most motorcycles using Bagani Amihan Tempest 4T, we recommend an oil change every 2,000–3,000 km under normal riding conditions, or every 1,500 km for heavy-duty use and long daily commutes.

faqs.q: Is Amihan Tempest compatible with my scooter?
faqs.a: The Amihan Tempest 4T (20W-50) is recommended for motorcycles and big bikes. For scooters, we recommend the Amihan Gale (10W-40 JASO MB) for better compatibility with CVT-equipped engines.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized motorcycle shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines. Contact us at info@baganioil.com to find the nearest dealer in your area.

JASO MA-2 is a Japanese Automotive Standards Organization certification for 4-stroke motorcycle oils. It ensures the oil provides excellent wet clutch friction performance, meaning your clutch will engage and disengage smoothly without slipping.

faqs.q: Can I mix Bagani oil with other brands?
faqs.a: While mixing oils won't immediately damage your engine, we recommend using only Bagani oils for best performance. Mixing different brands can dilute the additive packages and reduce the overall protection level. When switching, perform a full oil change.
